# Wub Hair

> Professional hairdresser and braiding specialist in Manchester. Fades, cuts, colour, box braids, cornrows and treatments. Online booking available.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Salon overview, featured services and online booking entry point.
- [Book](/book): Three-step booking wizard with stylist and time selection.
- [Services](/services): Full directory of hairdressing, braiding and treatment services.
- [Shop](/shop): Hair care products and retail.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, WhatsApp, email and salon address.

## Service categories

- [Braiding](/braiding): Box braids, cornrows and protective styles.
- [Hair Studio](/hair-studio): Cuts, colour and styling.
- [Kids](/kids): Children's haircuts and styling.

## Service detail

- [Hairdressing](/services/hairdressing)
- [Braiding](/services/braiding)
- [Hair Treatments](/services/hair-treatments)

## Areas served

- [Manchester](/areas/manchester)
- [Fallowfield](/areas/fallowfield)
- [Rusholme](/areas/rusholme)
- [Longsight](/areas/longsight)
- [Moss Side](/areas/moss-side)
- [Didsbury](/areas/didsbury)
